build.//buildCommand: npm install (not ci) is required because Railpack mounts /app/node_modules/.cache as a build cache and `npm ci` wipes node_modules wholesale, EBUSY-ing on the mount. --legacy-peer-deps because the lovable-tagger dep has peer-dep noise across React 18.
build.//: watchPatterns are evaluated relative to the repo root. Limiting to HOA-MARKETING/** stops sibling-app changes from triggering a redeploy of this service.

deploy.//: Static Vite SPA served by `serve`. `-s` enables SPA fallback so client-side routes (e.g. /login) survive a hard refresh; the public/_redirects + vercel.json files cover other deploy targets, but serve needs the -s flag here.
